title: Verify Trial Corner is mutually exclusive to other onboarding experiments
description: Test that users targeted for Trial Corner experiment do not see other onboarding experiments
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner cohort (no consumption in first 5 mins)

steps.description: 1. Create a new trial user who does not start consumption within 5 minutes
2. Log in and observe the experience
3. Check for absence of other onboarding experiments

expected_result: User sees Trial Corner and no other onboarding experiment flows are displayed
